name: TeamCardOne
description: Team member card with image background, overlay info card at bottom-left corner.
details: Use for team member profiles with compact overlay display. Layout: Outer Card (p-4) → Full Square Image → Bottom-Left Overlay Card (Name + Role Badge in row). Image has aspect-square with rounded-theme. Overlay positioned at bottom-4 left-4 with card styling. Name and role badge displayed horizontally with gap-3. Role uses primary-button styling. All core fields required for visual consistency. Best for team grids with clean, modern aesthetic. Automatically switches between grid (1-4 items) and carousel (5+ items). Optional header with title, description, tag, and buttons.

name.note: Team member name displayed in overlay card

imageSrc.note: Image path for team member photo (displays as square with rounded-theme)

videoSrc.note: Video path for team member (alternative to imageSrc)

imageAlt.note: Alt text for image (defaults to member name if not provided)

videoAriaLabel.note: Aria label for video (defaults to member name if not provided)

propsSchema.members: Array<{ id: string, name: string, role: string, imageSrc?: string, videoSrc?: string, imageAlt?: string, videoAriaLabel?: string }>
propsSchema.title: string
propsSchema.titleSegments?: Array<{ type: 'text', content: string } | { type: 'image', src: string, alt?: string }> - For inline images in title
propsSchema.buttons?: Array<{text: string, onClick?: () => void, href?: string}>
propsSchema.textboxLayout: 'default' | 'split' | 'split-actions' | 'split-description' | 'inline-image' (required - 'inline-image' uses titleSegments for rich text with images)
propsSchema.textBoxTitleImageWrapperClassName?: string - For styling image wrapper in inline-image layout
propsSchema.textBoxTitleImageClassName?: string - For styling images in inline-image layout

usageExample: <TeamCardOne members={[{ id: '1', name: 'Sophie P.', role: 'Digital Nomad', imageSrc: '/team/sophie.jpg' }]} title="Meet Our Team" description="Get to know the people behind our success" textboxLayout="default" animationType="slide-up" useInvertedBackground={false} />
